steps.title: Identify the two functions shown
steps.content:
The graph displays two functions:
  • A V-shaped absolute value graph.
  • A straight-line graph.
The solution is not found by writing equations; it is the point where the two visible graphs cross.

steps.title: Read the intersection point from the grid
steps.content: The straight line meets the left branch of the V-shaped graph at the point where $x=1$ and $y=5$. The solution is $(1,5)$, which matches choice C.
